describtion: Computer Engineering student with a passion for low-level systems and AI-driven backend development aimed at building sustainable innovations. Alongside my technical pursuits, I serve as a Mathematics and Physics tutor and university admissions consultant, dedicated to empowering students and promoting equal educational opportunities.

educations.school_name: King Mongkut's Institute of Technology Ladkrabang

description: Developed a FastAPI backend for news analysis, using embeddings to assess credibility and detect fake news.
Built a chatbot that analyzes user-submitted news and provides real-time fake news verification.
Collaborated in a startup developing AI-based health risk assessment technology and a telemedicine platform.
Acted as a company representative in meetings, delivering presentations on technology solutions.
Coordinated testing and validation, ensuring compliance with industry standards.
Tested web application functionality to ensure compliance with defined standards.
Reported system issues and defects to the development team for further improvement.

projects.name: Pai Fire Prediction (In Development)
projects.description: A predictive model for assessing forest fire risk areas using the XGBoost algorithm.

projects.name: E-Learning & Digital Marketplace (In Development)
projects.description: A web application featuring video-based online courses and a digital marketplace for selling summary study sheets.

projects.name: Where We go
projects.description: Where We Go is a travel-focused web application we developed to solve the classic dilemmas: 'Where should we go tonight?' or 'What should we do for our next trip?' The platform focuses on helping users discover and manage travel destinations or check-in spots with ease. Developed as part of a Web Application Development course, we used the MVC .NET framework to simulate a real-world development process, building everything from the front-end interface to the back-end infrastructure.

projects.name: Simple MERN CRUD App
projects.description: This project is part of the System Platform course. Our core objective isn't just standard web development, but mastering backend infrastructure.

footer: This website was built with Next.js in 2026.
